title: Tether-backed Oobit brings USDT to nearly 170 million users of Brazil's PIX payment network
message_html: Tether-backed Oobit brings USDT to nearly 170 million users of Brazil's PIX payment network ...
snippet: Created by Banco Central do Brasil in 2020, PIX is one of the world's most widely-adopted digital payment networks.

title: Midas' mGLOBAL token tracking Fasanara's alternative debt strategy launches on Aave Horizon
message_html: Midas' mGLOBAL token tracking Fasanara's alternative debt strategy launches on Aave Horizon ...
snippet: Holders will now be able to deposit mGLOBAL tokens on Aave Horizon to borrow USDC while retaining full exposure to the underlying strategy.
